text: **Anna:** It is no secret that Washington, D.

**Anna:** This is Agent {Flamingo|フラミンゴ} reporting for duty.

**Anna:** The mission is safe with me.

**Anna:** I'm afraid of dark small places.

**Anna:** It's just an {air duct|換気ダクト/通気口}.

**Anna:** Do spies have to be in {good shape|健康状態/体力|/ɡʊd ʃeɪp/|Athletes are in good shape.}?
**Anna:** Spies have to be in really {good shape|健康状態/体力|/ɡʊd ʃeɪp/|Athletes are in good shape.}!

**Anna:** Agent Peacock, I {completed|完了した/成し遂げた|/kəmˈpliːtɪd/|I completed my homework.} the mission.
